definitions: A positive outcome or finding that provides hope or motivation for future success.
A favorable conclusion or consequence that suggests progress or improvement.
examples: The initial trials showed an encouraging result.
We are pleased with the encouraging result of the negotiations.
This encouraging result validates our efforts.
